scriptDesc: Install Notepad++ text editor and sync user settings (3 modes: NPP + Settings, NPP Settings, Install NPP)

messages.notFound: Notepad++ not found -- will install now
messages.settingsSkipped: No settings files found in script folder -- skipping sync
messages.exportNoSource: Notepad++ AppData directory not found -- has Notepad++ been launched at least once?
messages.exportNoFiles: No config files found in Notepad++ AppData -- nothing to export
messages.exportComplete: Notepad++ settings exported -- {count} item(s) saved to {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.export: Export Notepad++ settings from machine to repo for backup
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
